reviews.review_title: THIS GAME USED TO BE FUN!
reviews.review_description: The game used to be filled with people running from monsters (that was fun) but then modders came, they go into this blinding epilepsy giving stage, where they go into glowing rainbow and make people invisible, in one lobby i saw a guy having a stroke (due to the glowing body) and then the modder made him invisible and muted him, gosh these people care for no one and only care about if people play their game, kick it off the store!

The game is pretty fun but the discord button on the computer isn't working. The graphics are very good and realistic. There are many modders but some of them are nice. The monsters are scary but not too scary. Overall a very nice game.
